g.text: Termination: All loops must have statically provable upper bound
Memory Safety: Every pointer access must be bounds-checked
Initialization: Variables must be written before being read on all paths
Stack Limit: Maximum 512 bytes of stack usage per program
Helper Checks: Return values must be checked before using results
Use bpf_probe_read_kernel() for safe pointer access
Add explicit bounds checks: if (idx < ARRAY_SIZE)
R0 max value is outside range

text.tspan: R0 max value is outside range
